home_note: To open our paper and resource pages, please first fill in your information on the Login page.
home_note_zh: 如需访问论文和资源页面，请您先在登录页填写信息。
home_welcome:
The SJTU Intelligent Optoelectronic Computing Lab works at the intersection of photonic computing, AI algorithms, chip design, and intelligent visual systems. We focus on high-speed, low-power optoelectronic AI chips, AI-assisted chip design, and software-hardware co-design for practical intelligent systems.

The group combines interdisciplinary expertise, advanced optical experimental platforms, and active domestic and international collaborations to support innovation from algorithms and devices to chip-level applications.
home_welcome_zh:
上海交通大学智能光电计算实验室面向光计算、AI 算法、芯片设计与智能视觉系统的交叉前沿，聚焦高速、低功耗光电 AI 芯片及其应用、AI 辅助芯片设计，以及面向实际智能系统的软硬件协同研究。

课题组具备跨学科背景、扎实科研积累、国际前沿光学实验平台和先进实验仪器，并通过充足科研支持与丰富国内外合作，支撑从算法、器件到芯片级应用的创新研究。
admissions_intro: We are recruiting motivated PhD and master's students, postdoctoral researchers, and interns for photonic AI acceleration, photonic chip design, and chip applications.
admissions_intro_zh: 课题组长期招收博士及硕士研究生、博士后、实习生，方向覆盖光芯片加速 AI、光芯片设计与芯片应用。
admissions_lab_profile: Candidates interested in high-speed, low-power optoelectronic AI chips, AI-assisted chip design, and interdisciplinary software-hardware research are welcome to contact us.
admissions_lab_profile_zh: 欢迎对高速、低功耗光电 AI 芯片及其应用、AI 辅助芯片设计和软硬件协同研究具有浓厚兴趣与强烈自驱力的同学联系。

admissions_directions.title: AI acceleration with photonic chips
admissions_directions.summary: Algorithm-oriented research for optical and optoelectronic intelligent computing.
admissions_directions.summary_zh: 偏 AI 算法，面向光学与光电智能计算。

admissions_directions.title: Photonic chip design
admissions_directions.summary: Physics- and chip-oriented research on optical computing hardware and AI-assisted chip design.
admissions_directions.summary_zh: 偏物理/芯片，面向光计算硬件实现与 AI 辅助芯片设计。

admissions_directions.title: Chip applications
admissions_directions.summary: Software-hardware co-design for practical intelligent optoelectronic systems.
admissions_directions.summary_zh: 软硬件兼顾，面向智能光电系统应用。

admissions_apply: Read the full recruitment notice for research directions, candidate expectations, and application materials.
admissions_apply_zh: 查看完整招募新闻，了解研究方向、申请要求和材料清单。
hero_summary: Research in high-speed, low-power optoelectronic AI chips, photonic AI acceleration, AI-assisted chip design, and intelligent chip applications.
hero_summary_zh: 聚焦高速、低功耗光电 AI 芯片、光芯片加速 AI、AI 辅助芯片设计与智能芯片应用。
lab_name: the SJTU Intelligent Optoelectronic Computing Lab
lab_name_short_zh: 上海交大智能光电计算实验室
lab_name_full: the SJTU Intelligent Optoelectronic Computing Lab
lab_name_full_zh: 上海交通大学智能光电计算实验室
footer_copyright_zh: 2026 上海交通大学智能光电计算实验室

research_highlights.title: Optoelectronic AI Chips
research_highlights.summary: Developing high-speed, low-power optoelectronic AI chips and chip-level systems for intelligent computing and visual tasks.
research_highlights.summary_zh: 面向智能计算与视觉任务，发展高速、低功耗光电 AI 芯片及芯片级系统。

research_highlights.title: Photonic AI Acceleration
research_highlights.summary: Algorithm-oriented optical and optoelectronic computing methods that accelerate AI workloads with photonic hardware.
research_highlights.summary_zh: 偏 AI 算法，研究利用光学与光电计算硬件加速智能任务的方法。

research_highlights.title: Photonic Chip Design
research_highlights.summary: Physics- and chip-oriented design of photonic computing devices, supported by AI-assisted chip design workflows.
research_highlights.summary_zh: 偏物理/芯片，围绕光计算器件、芯片实现与 AI 辅助芯片设计开展研究。

research_highlights.title: Chip Applications
research_highlights.summary: Building practical intelligent optoelectronic applications through software-hardware co-design and interdisciplinary collaboration.
research_highlights.summary_zh: 软硬件兼顾，通过协同设计与交叉合作推动智能光电芯片应用落地。
